title: 宝塚記念の後に・陰り

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's wrong with Kitasan? Is she sick or
something?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She usually puts up a better fight at the end. The
Kitasan I know is more...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
It's not like you to be down like that! Where's that
spirit of yours, Kitasan?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black didn't run with her usual edge
today, and I think I know why.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Hi, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I-I can't take it... I can't listen to the crowd...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm well aware that my performance was pathetic,
but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I let everyone down!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, Kita...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You weren't feeling like yourself today, right?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Sniff... It's like my body is... heavy... today.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I knew I had to pick up the pace... but... my legs
wouldn't move...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Even though I worked so hard...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I was so happy I got the most—sniff—the most fan votes... out of anyone...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I worked so, so, so hard... I wanted to meet everyone's expectations so bad!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: So whyyy?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Do you think it miiight be possible that you're still
tired from the Tenno Sho? That's how I was
feeling too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is still exhausted from the intensity
of the spring Tenno Sho as well. She just didn't
realize it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She pushed through that exhaustion because of
her desire to meet everyone's expectations, but it
didn't actually go away. In fact, it continued to
build up.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You were working yourself too hard... That's just
like you.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Me? Tired? There's no way... But...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I wasn't listening to my own body...
And I let everyone down because of it...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: This is so... sooo... frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. I think all of your fans know how hard
you've been working.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They've been watching you and cheering you on
this whole time.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But I messed up, even after everyone voted for
me... They must be appalled...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You think they won't support you anymore
because you disappointed them?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yes... After all, I'm nothing special. The only
reason I was getting any attention was because I
was winning.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I kept winning, and that's why I was gaining
support!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If I don't win, I'll just go back to being a
forgettable nobody...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any special skills like your final burst
of speed. All I can do is work hard the
old-fashioned way...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's what makes you so amazing, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You put your whole heart into racing. I think
seeing that is what makes everyone want to cheer
you on.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I think they're enamored with the effort you've
poured into keeping yourself running and getting
to this point.

text_block_list.name: Homebound Male Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
The way Kitasan Black runs with everything she's
got, you can't help but root for her. Talk about
focus.

text_block_list.name: Homebound Male Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I know what you mean! She's just so
down-to-earth and relatable. It's almost like she's
one of us regular Joes.

text_block_list.name: Homebound Male Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want her to win! It feels like I've won
too when she does!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
When you win, it makes them as happy as if they
had won themselves.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
"I can do my best because I know Kitasan is out
there doing hers."
...That's the kind of thing your fans are saying. I
don't have that kind of support.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, it makes me a little jealous
sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean she's going for the Senior Spring
Triple Crown?! Go get it, Kitasan!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Kitasaaan! You can win it this time!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Fans don't identify themselves that closely with
just anyone. You've got something special.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They don't just love you for being strong. They
love you for being you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: So everything will be okay, all right?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's true that they might be disappointed today,
but I think your fans all still have high
expectations for you.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You really think so?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes. And I do too.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I believe in you, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond seems to be lost in thought after
leaving the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: How do you want to see me, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unsure of what she's trying to get at, I respond
with a question my own.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking. If everyone wants to support
Kita because they can relate to her, then what do
they want from me?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Her contribution as an illustrious runner is
bringing smiles to her fans' faces.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But I still can't even envision what it is I could
possibly do...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What should I be doing to help the world of
Umamusume flourish?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As an Umamusume, what is it that my running can
bring to everyone?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What do the fans want from Satono Diamond?
The dream she shows them when she runs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Illustrious runners show each fan a unique dream
when they run.
choice_data_list: I see the power of possibility within you.
I see the power of possibility within you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hidden within her is a strong, unwavering spirit.
She possesses the power to make others feel like
she can overcome impossible odds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all, she was able to overcome the jinx that
plagued the Satono family for so many years.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I see... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'll mull it over some more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond falls back into her own
thoughts, so I take care not to disturb her as we
walk back to the station.
